programming: On-board: cycle master key in/out of ignition 5x, open/close driver door 6x, insert new key, wait 60s until immobilizer light stops flashing
notes: All pre-2003 Camry use 4C chip with TOY43AT4/TR47 blade. No remote function on base transponder key.

programming: On-board (D-chip): cycle master key, door open/close sequence; or OBDII programmer
notes: 2003-2010 Camry use 4D67 chip (D chip). Strattec ref 5910834. Base CE/LE trims use plain transponder; upper LE/SE/XLE trims (2007-2010) use integrated remote head key HYQ12BBY (PN 89070-06231 / 89070-06232) at 315 MHz.

programming: On-board (G-chip): master key cycle 5x, door 6x, insert new key, wait 60s; or OBDII dongle
notes: 2011-2014 Camry use G chip (4D72/DST40). Split year for 2015: verify chip with original key. Upper trims (LE/SE/XLE 2012-2014) received integrated remote head key HYQ12BDM (PN 89070-06420) at 315 MHz; base L trim used plain transponder.

programming: OBDII required for H chip; no on-board programming
notes: 2015 is a split year; some units carry G chip. Verify original key chip before ordering.

programming: No on-board programming. Professional locksmith or dealer required. OBDII programmer with 8A support. 12-digit security code required for all-keys-lost.
notes: Board variant 0351 (HYQ14FBC-0351). 2023+ Camry may use HYQ14FLA (board 3450). US production only; verify VIN origin. Emergency blade TOY48 (P/N 69515-47030).

programming: On-board D-chip sequence or OBDII programmer
notes: Includes 2003-2008 Matrix sharing same platform and key spec.

programming: On-board G-chip sequence or OBDII dongle
OBDII required for H chip
notes: 2019 Corolla (Japan-built, VIN starts J) uses HYQ12BDM. US-built 2020 Corolla transitions to smart key.

programming: No on-board programming. Professional locksmith/dealer required.
notes: 2020+ Corolla (US-built) uses smart key with 8A chip. Corolla IM (2017-2019) uses TOY48H-PT transponder with H chip.

programming: On-board D-chip sequence or OBDII programmer
notes: Base trims (2003-2012) use plain transponder. Upper trims (Sport/Limited 2006-2012) use integrated remote head key HYQ12BBY (PN 89070-42660 / 89070-42670) with 4D67 chip at 315 MHz.

programming: No on-board programming. Professional OBDII programmer required.
notes: US-built LE/XLE turn-key ignition trims use remote head key GQ4-52T (H chip, TR47, PN 89071-0R040 / 89070-0R120) at 315 MHz. Japan-built turn-key trims use HYQ12BDM (H chip) — VIN starts with J. Push-to-start trims (XLE Premium/Limited) use smart key HYQ14FBA (board 0020). Verify VIN origin and ignition type before ordering.

programming: No on-board programming. Professional locksmith/dealer. 12-digit code for all-keys-lost.
notes: 2019+ RAV4 uses HYQ14FBC with DST-AES chip. OEM P/N: 8990H-0R010 (3-btn) / 8990H-0R030 (4-btn).

programming: On-board D-chip sequence or OBDII programmer
On-board G-chip sequence or OBDII dongle
No on-board programming for H/8A. OBDII required. Smart key: AG board 2110.
notes: 2016-2020 Tacoma smart key uses HYQ14FBA (AG board 2110); 2021+ uses HYQ14FBB (board 0010). Base/SR trims use RHK with H chip; SR5/TRD/Limited use Smart key. Emergency blade for smart key: K-TOY-EM36.

programming: OBDII programmer required for flip key remote programming
notes: GQ43VT20T is long-running FCC ID used across multiple Tundra/Sequoia generations. Chip for 2007-2010 confirmed as 4D67 (ID47).

programming: G chip: on-board sequence or OBDII.
notes: Tundra 2011-2014 (G chip generation). Transponder and Flip key both use 4D72 G chip. 2015-2017 transitioned to H chip (4D74) — see next entry.

programming: H chip: OBDII only; no on-board procedure.
notes: Tundra 2015-2017 (H chip generation). Same GQ43VT20T FCC as 2011-2014 but different chip (4D74 H chip). WARNING: G chip (TOY44G-PT) will NOT work for these years — use TOY44H-PT. H chip requires OBDII programmer (no on-board sequence).

programming: No on-board programming. OBDII professional programmer required.
notes: SR and SR5 trims with turn-key ignition use remote head key GQ4-52T (H chip, TR47, PN 89071-0R040 / 89070-0C050) at 315 MHz. Limited, Platinum, TRD Pro, and 1794 trims with push-to-start use smart key HYQ14FBB (board 0010). Emergency blade for smart key: K-TOY-EM36. Test key TOY51.

programming: On-board 4C sequence
G chip: on-board sequence or OBDII dongle. Smart key HYQ14AAB: OBDII required, no on-board programming.
notes: Base and non-Limited trims use G-chip transponder key. Highlander Limited and Hybrid Limited (2008-2013) use smart key HYQ14AAB (board 271451-0140, 4D67 chip, 315 MHz, PN 89904-48110) with push-to-start. 2011-2013 Highlander G-chip confirmed per UHS Hardware.

programming: H chip and smart key: OBDII programmer required, no on-board
notes: Base LE trim may use H-chip transponder key; higher trims use smart key (HYQ14FBA AG-board 2110).

programming: No on-board programming. Professional locksmith/dealer required.
notes: 2022 Highlander OEM P/N 8990H-0E030 (4-btn). 3-btn variant: 8990H-0E010.

programming: On-board D-chip sequence or OBDII programmer
G chip: on-board sequence; Smart key HYQ14FBA: OBDII, no on-board
notes: SR5 and above with push-to-start use smart key. Base SR/Trail trims use G-chip transponder.

programming: No on-board programming. Professional OBDII required.
notes: 2021+ uses HYQ14FLA with DST-AES ID8A. Emergency blade K-TOY-EM36.

programming: On-board sequence supported for 4D69 variant; OBDII recommended
notes: 2004-2009 Prius uses MOZB31EG smart key at 312 MHz with 4D69 chip. Part numbers: 89994-47061 / 89904-47011 / 89994-47060 / 89994-47091. IC: 2584A-B31EG.

programming: OBDII required; no on-board programming
notes: HYQ14ACX with GNE board 5290. Chip confirmed Texas ID 4D67 (not 8A). Battery: CR1632.

programming: No on-board programming. Professional OBDII required.
No on-board programming. Professional locksmith/dealer required.
On-board 4C sequence
On-board D-chip sequence or OBDII
G chip transponder: on-board sequence. Smart key: OBDII required.
notes: Sienna 2011-2014 (G chip generation for transponder). Base trims use G chip (4D72/TOY44G-PT). Push-button trims use Smart HYQ14FBA (8A, 315 MHz). 2015+ transponder changed to H chip — see next entry.

programming: H chip transponder: OBDII only (no on-board). Smart key: OBDII required.
notes: Sienna 2015-2020 (H chip generation). Base trims use H chip transponder (4D74/TOY44H-PT). Push-button trims use Smart HYQ14FBA (8A, 315 MHz) — same FCC as 2011-2014. WARNING: G chip blade (TOY44G-PT) will not clone H chip — use TOY44H-PT. 2021+ all-new platform — see next entry.

programming: No on-board programming. Professional locksmith/dealer required.
notes: 5-button smart key (Lock, Unlock, L-slide, R-slide, Panic). Battery CR2450. FCC HYQ14FBX board 3041.

programming: On-board 4C sequence
OBDII programmer required.
notes: Sequoia 2008-2010: 4D67 chip (D chip), same GQ43VT20T FCC. 2011-2014 transitioned to G chip (4D72) — see next entry.

programming: OBDII programmer required.
notes: Sequoia 2011-2014: G chip (4D72/DST40), same GQ43VT20T FCC as 2008-2010 but different chip — verify before programming. 2015+ changed to H chip and added Smart key — see next entry.

programming: H chip flip key: OBDII required. Smart key: no on-board, professional required.
notes: 2016 Sequoia flip key uses H chip per locksmithkeyless.com. Sequoia smart key is 4-button (Lock/Unlock/Hatch/Panic); 2015-2021 uses HYQ14FBA / 89904-0E120 (AG board 2110). Note: 2021-2022 Sequoia may also show HYQ14FBB / 89904-0C040 — verify trim and build date.

programming: On-board 4C sequence
On-board D-chip sequence (transponder) or OBDII. Smart key: OBDII required, no on-board programming.
notes: Lower trims use plain 4D67 transponder. XLS and Limited push-to-start trims: 2005-2007 use HYQ14AAF (PN 89904-07030, 315 MHz, 4D67 chip); 2007-2012 use HYQ14AAB (PN 89904-06041 board 0140 / PN 89904-06130 board 3370, 315 MHz, 4D67 chip). Both HYQ14AAB boards (0140 and 3370) are NOT interchangeable — verify original board number.

programming: No on-board programming. OBDII professional required.
notes: ILCO code AX00014450 (PRX-TOY-4B10). G-board (0020) variant.

programming: No on-board programming. Professional locksmith/dealer required.
notes: Board 231451-0410. Avalon Hybrid: P/N 8990H-07020.

programming: OBDII required; no on-board programming for H chip or 8A smart key
notes: C-HR uses TOY48 keyway (not TR47). Base turn-key trims use H chip transponder (TOY48H-PT, PN 89785-02410). Push-to-start trims use smart key MOZBR1ET (IC: 2584A-BR1ET, board 0010, 315 MHz, PN 89904-F4020 / 89904-10050). 2018: XLE Premium and above; 2019+: XLE and Limited have push-to-start standard.

programming: On-board 4C sequence
notes: RX300 (1999-2003). Short blade (TOY48BT4/TR48PHT). Remote head key FCC NI4TMTX-1 confirmed at 315 MHz with 4C chip.

programming: OBDII required for 4D68
No on-board programming. Professional OBDII required.
notes: G board 231451-0010. Covers RX350, RX350L, RX450h, RX450hL 2016-2019. Also compatible with 2019-2021 LX570 (same FCC HYQ14FBB). Emergency key blade: 69515-30380 (LXP90 profile). 2020+ RX uses HYQ14FLB (see next row).

programming: No on-board programming. Professional locksmith or dealer required.
notes: Board 3950. IC: 1551A-14FLB. ILCO: IAX00020700 (PRX-LEX-4B20). Covers RX350, RX350L, RX450h, RX450hL.

programming: On-board 4C sequence
notes: ES300 (1997-2003). Short blade.

programming: OBDII required for 4D68
No on-board programming. Professional OBDII required.
No on-board programming. Professional OBDII required.
No on-board programming. Professional locksmith/dealer required.
notes: 2022+ NX redesign (NX250, NX350, NX350h, NX450h+) uses HYQ14FLC with board IC 1551A-14FLC. Part numbers also include 8990H-78011, 8990H-78012. Battery CR2032.

programming: OBDII required for 4D68
notes: GX470 (2003-2009). ILCO: RHK-LEXUS-3B3 for remote head key.

programming: OBDII required; no on-board programming.
notes: GX460 (2010-2018). GNE board 5290. Battery CR1632. 4-btn with rear glass hatch. 2019+ GX460 transitions to HYQ14FBF / 89904-60U80 (not covered here).

programming: On-board 4C sequence
notes: IS300 (2001-2005). Short blade TOY48.

programming: OBDII required for 4D68
notes: IS250, IS350 (2006-2013). Same key spec as ES/GX 4D68 era.

programming: No on-board programming. Professional OBDII required.
No on-board programming. Professional locksmith/dealer required.
On-board D-chip sequence or OBDII programmer
notes: First-gen tC uses 4D67 chip per TOY44D-PT compatibility list.

programming: G chip: on-board sequence; H chip: OBDII required
notes: 2014-2015 tC 10-series uses TOY48 keyway with H chip per ILCO TOY48H-PT compatibility.

programming: On-board D-chip sequence or OBDII programmer
notes: 2nd-gen xB (2008-2015). TOY44D-PT per compatibility list.

programming: On-board G-chip sequence or OBDII dongle
